_comment: Personas drive permission trimming. A persona sees a fixture if the fixture acl contains the persona id OR 'all'. oncall_lead = full incident view incl confidential customer-comms commitment thread + sensitivity-labelled customer-impact assessment + exec briefing; sre_engineer = incident signals + the customer-impact assessment doc but NOT the confidential customer-comms thread or exec/commercial files; contractor = least privilege; incident_commander = sees everything.

personas.label: Marco Reyes — On-Call Lead / SRE Lead
personas.description: Full incident leadership view including the confidential customer-communications commitment thread and sensitivity-labelled customer-impact and exec files.

personas.label: Aisha Khan — SRE Engineer (on-call)
personas.description: Sees incident bridge calls, channel mitigations, action tracker, and the sensitivity-labelled customer-impact assessment, but NOT the confidential customer-comms commitment thread or exec/commercial files.

personas.label: Evan Cole — Contractor SRE (least privilege)
personas.description: Least-privilege contractor. Sees only non-sensitive incident signals; cannot see the confidential customer-comms thread, the customer-impact assessment, or exec files.

personas.label: Helen Cho — Incident Commander / Director (escalation)
personas.description: Incident command + engineering leadership view. Sees everything oncall_lead sees.
